user.description: Enter your PurpleAir API key and choose how to locate your sensor.

data_description.name: A name to identify this location (e.g. Home, Cabin, Office)
data_description.device_search: Enable to discover nearby sensors automatically. Disable to enter a specific private sensor index.

by_coordinates.description: Set the search center and parameters for finding nearby sensors.

data_description.weighted: Weight sensor readings by inverse distance from the search center.
data_description.conversion: Formula applied to correct raw PM₂.₅ readings before AQI calculation.
data_description.pm25_averaging: Time window for PM₂.₅ readings. Has no effect when using LRAPA, Woodsmoke, or CF=1 conversions, which require real-time CF=1 data.

by_sensor.description: Enter the index and optional read key for your private PurpleAir sensor.

data_description.conversion: Formula applied to correct raw PM₂.₅ readings before AQI calculation.
data_description.pm25_averaging: Time window for PM₂.₅ readings. Has no effect when using LRAPA, Woodsmoke, or CF=1 conversions, which require real-time CF=1 data.

init.description: Adjust search and calculation settings. Changes take effect immediately on save.

data_description.weighted: Weight sensor readings by inverse distance from the search center.
data_description.conversion: Formula applied to correct raw PM₂.₅ readings before AQI calculation.
data_description.pm25_averaging: Time window for PM₂.₅ readings. Has no effect when using LRAPA, Woodsmoke, or CF=1 conversions, which require real-time CF=1 data.
data_description.name: A name to identify this location (e.g. Home, Cabin, Office)
